allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: msg = json.loads\(line\) if msg.get\('role'\) == 'assistant': content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(block['text']\) print\('---SEPARATOR---'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(content\) print\('---SEPARATOR---'\) ")
